benefits.description: Reta makes it nearly impossible to get calories in; described as controlled starvation, very effective for weight loss
Tesamorelin is good for forcing the body towards anabolism and helping maintain and build muscle; a great recomp tool
MOTS-C helps with glucose uptake into muscle, fat partitioning, and directing calories toward use rather than storage

protocol_notes: User has personal experience with all three compounds separately. Notes reta is counterproductive for a caloric surplus due to extreme appetite suppression. Tesamorelin used with good results for recomposition. MOTS-C described as a metabolic adaptation peptide rather than a fat loss peptide.
